message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: All four bucket-level public access block settings will be enabled for this bucket.

blocked_reasons: Runtime evidence could not prove the bucket is private and website hosting is disabled.
Missing bucket identifier for access-path validation.
resolution.decision_rationale: Family resolver preserved explicit S3.2 profile 's3_bucket_block_public_access_manual_preservation' but downgraded it to non-executable guidance. Runtime evidence could not prove the bucket is private and website hosting is disabled. Missing bucket identifier for access-path validation.
